title: Air Canada C.E.O. Apologizes for English-Language Condolences After Plane Crash
summary_full: Michael Rousseau said he was “deeply saddened” that his ​inability to speak French had diverted attention from the families’ grief.
summary_public: Michael Rousseau said he was “deeply saddened” that his ​inability to speak French had diverted attention from the families’ grief.
